mnemonics.title: Exit Functions
mnemonics.content: **E**xit is for **E**legant cleanup (flushes buffers, runs handlers). **_E**xit is for **E**mergency exit (immediate, no cleanup).

mnemonics.title: Wait Macros
mnemonics.content: **W**hat **I**s **F**inal? **EXITED** or **SIGNALED**? Use **WIFEXITED** and **WIFSIGNALED** to find out. Then get the details with **WEXITSTATUS** and **WTERMSIG**.

mnemonics.title: Zombie Cause
mnemonics.content: **Z**ombies **A**re **P**arents' **N**eglect. A Zombie Appears if a Parent Neglects to call wait().
